# AlertEvent

> Record of an alert that was triggered

## Fields

| Field | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|-------|------|----------|---------|-------------|
| id | uuid | yes | auto | Primary key |
| alertType | budget_exceeded \| budget_warning \| drift_detected \| cost_anomaly \| agent_stalled \| error_rate_spike \| token_rate_limit | yes | - | Type of alert |
| severity | critical \| warning \| info | yes | - | Alert severity level |
| title | string | yes | - | Short alert title |
| message | string | yes | - | Detailed alert message |
| channelName | string | yes | - | Which alert channel delivered this |
| delivered | boolean | yes | false | Whether the alert was successfully delivered |
| acknowledgedAt | string | yes | - | ISO datetime when acknowledged |
| metadata | json | yes | - | Additional context |
| createdAt | datetime | yes | auto | Creation timestamp |
| updatedAt | datetime | yes | auto | Last update timestamp |
